dataset: OpenCAD system with GTAV game data

pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Remington 870 Breacher is a real tactical/police shotgun (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Remington_Model_870, https://www.americanspecialops.com/special-ops-weapons/remington-870-shotgun.php)
Web search confirmed Remington 870 Breacher is a pump-action shotgun (https://botach.com/remington-870-police-special-breaching-shotgun-14-royal-arms-modified-barrel-non-nfa/)

privileged_info_summary: The task adds a weapon to OpenCAD's Data Manager. The weapon metadata specifies: name 'Remington 870 Breacher' (a real tactical shotgun model) and type 'Shotgun'. Both values are correctly specified - the Remington 870 Breacher is a pump-action shotgun platform widely used by law enforcement for breaching operations. The task operates on a synthetic OpenCAD system using GTAV game data.
